text_preview:
## Report from the Security Information Division [of the 4th Air Zone Command] to the Ministry of Aeronautics.

AUG 21st, 1970. Time: 23: 00hs. Five university students from Agudos-SP, who “used to travel every night to Bauru-SP” to attend classes at Faculdade Educacional de Bauru, saw “a strange light on the night of August 21st, 1970, at 23:00 hs.

The five students were traveling in the same car, and one of the girls in the back seat on the left side noticed a red light on Marechal Rondon highway, on the stretch “shortly after the YY Farm”. According to this witness, “the light was opaque,
summary: Five female students driving near Agudos-SP observed a shape-shifting biconvex light that followed their car, changing from sphere to rectangle along the Marechal Rondon highway.
